name: rename_column
details: renames one column in the target frame preserving position and values (dotted worldbuilding columns included), then rewrites supported metadata references from the old to the new name; a structured reference in a blocked or unknown root aborts the whole operation and returns the original frames
notes: the Slice 1 anchor suboperation; per-surface rename policies live in meta_reference_surfaces.rename_column_policy

name: add_column
details: adds one column with a default value at an append/before/after placement; fails if the column exists; the blocked/unknown-root scan applies to the new name
notes: shallow row: the SchemaOperationKind dispatch in operations.py forces the enumeration; deep modeling is deferred

name: drop_column
details: drops one column; referencing metadata blocks by default; prune=true prunes constraint entries and column-list members, but FK relation references always block
notes: shallow row; per-surface drop policies live in meta_reference_surfaces.drop_column_policy

name: reorder_columns
details: reorders columns (complete/listed_first/listed_last); performs no metadata rewriting and no blocking
